fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and earnings expansion, but trades at a very high valuation and has thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 18.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 113.4% indicate strong business expansion.
High gross margin of 79.9% suggests efficient core operations.
Significant free cash flow of $936.73M provides financial flexibility.
Consensus is strong buy from 47 analysts with a mean target price near the current spot price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 570.87 and Price/Sales of 21.58 are extremely high, indicating a very expensive stock.
Operating margin of 0.8% and profit margin of 3.7% are thin relative to revenue, despite high gross margins.
Return on assets is negative at -0.2%, and return on equity is low at 3.9%.
Beta of 1.29 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Datadog has hit a 52-week high and is flashing a golden cross technical signal, with multiple sources highlighting bullish Wall Street views and its trending status. The company's recent performance and analyst sentiment suggest continued upward momentum, though the broader cyber security sector is also seeing strength. Traders should monitor if this rally can be sustained following the recent price appreciation.
